MINI MINUTES: Appearances: JONATHAN BORNSTEIN, ESQ., 415.409.7611, FOR PLAINTIFF HUBERT WONG.
REED HARVEY, ESQ., 415.369.9050, FOR DEFENDANT KAREN FUNG SANG LUM.

RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling: DEFENDANT KAREN FUNG SANG LUM'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is denied. As the Court previously determined in its Order Denying Motion for Summary Judgment and Granting in Part and Denying in Part Alternate Motion for Summary Adjudication filed December 20, 2012 at page 2, l. 9-15, this action is not logically related to the Clancy action so this action is not barred by Cal. Civ. Pro. 426.30. The responses to requests for admission cited by Defendants in their moving papers in this motion are not sufficient new evidence to cause the Court to grant this second motion for summary judgment. The motion for summary adjudication of the fifth and eighth causes of action on statute of limitations grounds is granted. Defendant shifted the burden and Plaintiff failed to oppose or raise a triable issue of fact. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Anthony Vaughn #6185.
